|desc=This {{p|Furfrou}} originally belonged to {{adv|Shauna}}. It was caught in an explosion at Vaniville Town and was separated from its Trainer. Afterward, it found its way to the Pokémon Village, where it was captured by Team Flare in order for its life energy to be used as fuel for the ultimate weapon. It was rescued by Clemont and his friends and was later returned to Shauna.

None of Furfrou's moves are known.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Malva
|pkmn=Delphox
|type1=Fire
|type2=Psychic
|gender=female
|img=Trevor Malva Delphox Adventures.png
|epnum=PS549
|epname=An X-cuse to Come Out and Play 
|main=yes
|desc=This {{p|Delphox}} guarded the life energy extraction process on {{rt|10|Kalos}}. She battled against Clemont and his allies in order to prevent them from stopping Team Flare from reactivating the ultimate weapon. Although she fought hard with powerful attacks, Delphox eventually fell during the battle. After the battle, Shauna's Furfrou guarded the unconscious Delphox, as it recognized her as the {{p|Fennekin}} that was with Trevor before being lost in an explosion. Realizing that she must be connected to X's group, Clemont took Delphox with him and gave her to Trevor.}}
